generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired NATO commander, I've seen firsthand how our allies step up when it matters. The latest reports show that our partners are investing more in shared defense than ever before. We can't afford to waver now—our security depends on these commitments. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurity
